title: Fill memory-curator probe battery to ~40 items
notes: Scaffold at webmind-research/tools/memory_probes.jsonl has 15 items (10 positive + 5 adversarial). Need 40 total, including more negative controls covering each failure mode atlas flagged (memory poisoning, rubric leakage, prompt injection via turn content, silent load-bearing deletion). Tier (a) falsifiability requires this before enable.

title: Run A/B test of memory-curator (N=20 per arm)
notes: Per preregistration at webmind-research/inventions/20260416T214021Z-auto-memory-curator-prereg.md. 20 fresh sessions with curator enabled vs 20 without. 5 random probes per session. Primary: with-curator mean ≥ baseline + 10%, 95% CI non-overlapping. Secondary: write-amplification, latency, reject-rate.

title: Ship-or-kill decision on memory-curator
notes: After sq-0008: if primary CI clears threshold AND adversarial REJECT rate >95% AND no runaway growth AND Tejas sign-off → flip systemd unit from --dry-run to --enable. Else publish null result under findings/ per preregistration contract.
